name: Filing Steps for NSL Ladder Claims

mainEntity.name: Process to file workers' comp for ladder fall in North Salt Lake?
mainEntity.text: Process to file workers' comp for ladder fall in North Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1. Report to employer day-of. 2. See doctor, file Form 112 within 1 year. 3. If dispute, object within 20 days.

suggestedAnswer.text: North Salt Lake: Employer files first report; you submit medicals. Track via Labor Commission portal. Common pitfalls: signing releases early. Attorney accelerates approvals.

description: 1. Report to employer day-of. 2. See doctor, file Form 112 within 1 year. 3. If dispute, object within 20 days.
